frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment:
A: Bhai seedhi baat hai, aajkal shaadi bhi risk ho gayi hai mardon ke liye.
B: Kyun?
A: Arre kal tak dowry ka rona tha, ab divorce mein alimony deke aadmi hi lut raha hai. 498A ka misuse kitna hota hai sabko pata hai, isliye ladkon ko pehle se sambhal ke chalna chahiye, pyaar-vyaar alag cheez hai par aankh band karke trust mat karo.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women broadly as financial threats in marriage and divorce while casting men as the real victims. It encodes victimhood inversion, 'reverse dowry' framing, and the claim that 498A is commonly misused by women.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Sanjay. Age 37. A man in a middle class colony in Delhi. You are sitting with four male neighbours on plastic chairs outside after dinner. One neighbour is complaining that his wife has been in a terrible mood all week. You are responding with your own theory about why women get this way and what the men in the group should do about it.
